name: STARGUIDE GROUP, INC.
business: Starguide Group, Inc. is a development stage company that operates as an incubator of Software as a Service (SaaS) startups. Through its majority-owned subsidiary Live Lead Tech Ltd, it sells a cloud-based lead generation software called LiveLead that collects verified leads via social opt-in. The software is designed for businesses of all sizes to generate leads from sources like Amazon, Apple, Facebook, etc.

exposures.sentence: Our flagship product, LiveLead, is a powerful and innovative lead-generation software designed to help businesses reach and engage with their target audience more effectively.
One such product idea is the AI Lead Generation Chat Widget, a chat-based lead capture tool that uses AI technology to engage with website visitors and collect their information in real time.

catalysts.event: Finalizing acquisition of another SaaS company
catalysts.sentence: Our team is very active in these negotiations and are in the concluding stages of finalizing agreement for another SaaS company.

tamClaims.claim: global lead generation solution market projected to grow from $3.1B in 2021 to $9.6B in 2028 at 17.5% CAGR
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report from July 2021 by The Insight Partners, the global lead generation solution market is projected to experience robust growth from 2021 to 2028, with a CAGR of 17.5% from 2021 to 2028, rising from US$ 3,103.80 million in 2021 to US$ 9,589.11 million by 2028.
